title: Export dropdown list only on a board to excel.
excerpt:
Description
My board has three items and more than 200 dropdown list. I need to be able to export the dropdown list to better manage it. 
What are you trying to achieve
will help everyone manage download list better

posts.author: grace.akinyemi (MamaEND)

posts.author: Iryna_Belaya (Iryna Belaya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @grace.akinyemi ,

If you’re open to apps, you can test for free Smart Spreadsheet for monday. It is compatible with the dropdown column. When you import a boardinto the Smart Spreadsheet view, and the Dropdown colimn is automatically converted to the dropdown list:
